changes.content: Added Resume variant to Command enum with id: String parameter
Added match arm Command::Resume { id } => cards::cmd_resume(&root, &id).await

changes.purpose: Enable compilation while actual implementation follows in subtask-4-2

changes.notes: Captured implementation details for future reference

patterns_discovered.name: Command enum variant pattern

patterns_discovered.name: Stub-first implementation

patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables incremental development across subtasks without blocking phase completion

patterns_discovered.name: Paired command structure

approach_outcome.description: Add Resume command variant to main.rs Command enum
completed_activities: Added Resume variant to Command enum with id: String parameter
Wired match arm in main() to dispatch to cmd_resume
Created stub cmd_resume function in cards.rs

approach_outcome.remaining_work: Subtask-4-2 (cmd_resume implementation) and subtask-4-3 (already completed per notes)

recommendations.details: Mirror the cmd_pause pattern: scan pending/ directories, read meta.json for each card, check if paused_at is Some, clear it (set to None), write meta back, update thumbnail
cmd_pause sets paused_at to Utc::now(); cmd_resume must clear it. Consider helper function for paused_at manipulation

recommendations.action: Add integration test for pause/resume cycle
recommendations.details: Create a card in pending/, pause it (move to paused pending/), resume it, verify paused_at is cleared
Handle: card not found, card not in pending/, meta.json read failure, filesystem race conditions with dispatcher
Document 'bop resume <id>' behavior: clears paused_at marker, prepares card for next dispatch cycle
